creator: jez.hancock@munk.me.uk
text:
www/p5-WWW-Mechanize-Shell fails to work after latest upgrade of
www/p5-WWW-Mechanize. WWW::Mechanize::Shell author is aware of the
problem and indicates a 2 week period before a fix.

Fix: 

Author of WWW::Mechanize::Shell suggests 2 weeks at least before a fix.
Perhaps mark port broken until then?
How-To-Repeat: Install/upgrade www/p5-WWW-Mechanize to latest version from ports.
Install www/p5-WWW-Mechanize-Shell from ports.
Initiate a mechshell:

perl -MWWW::Mechanize::Shell -eshell

results in error:

Can't call method "request" on an undefined value at
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/WWW/Mechanize.pm line 430.
